metadata.description: A possession-based NBA analytical suite built in Python 3.14 to identify market inefficiencies. Leverages the Four-Factor Model, Pace-Adjusted scoring, and a Fatigue Adjuster to generate "Fair Lines." Features a dynamic terminal UI with real-time data ingestion via nba_api. Designed for data-driven edge detection. 🏀💻📈
